name: Lavender One-Shoulder Gown
description: Elegant one-shoulder lavender gown with sequin detailing, ideal for evening receptions or engagement parties.
stylistNotes: Pair with diamond studs and a sleek bracelet for an understated glam look.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store on hanger with dust bag.

name: Pastel Floral Printed Lehenga
description: Soft pastel lehenga with floral print, minimal embroidery and modern blouse cut – ideal for light pre-wedding events.
stylistNotes: Keep it chic with a ponytail or short hair and statement silver jewelry.
materialCare: Gentle hand wash or dry clean. Iron on reverse side.

name: Sea Green Net Embroidered Lehenga
description: Sheer net lehenga in sea green with bead and sequin embroidery. Ideal for elegant evening functions.
stylistNotes: Go for nude makeup and a metallic clutch to elevate the look.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Do not iron directly on embroidery.

name: Red Bridal Embellished Lehenga
description: Heavy traditional red bridal lehenga with golden zari and sequin work, ideal for main wedding day ceremony.
stylistNotes: Complete the look with bold bridal makeup and layered jewelry.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Wrap in muslin cloth when storing.
